summary: What-If Quick Toggle feature testing complete. All 12 tests passed. The What-If panel opens/closes correctly, all 4 sliders (Savings Rate 5-50%, Market Return 2-12%, Retirement Age 50-70, Inflation 1-6%) work with default values (15%, 7%, 60, 3%). When sliders are modified, the 'Modified' badge appears, 'Projected Impact' section shows Retirement Nest Egg, Monthly Savings, and Success Probability metrics with delta indicators. Reset button successfully resets all values. Save as Scenario button navigates to Scenarios page. Dashboard displays all key metrics correctly: Net Worth $1,978,000, Monthly Cashflow +$5,417, Goal Progress 3/4, Retirement Success 81%. Financial Health Score gauge shows 82/100. Navigation to AI Advisor and Scenarios pages works correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - charts may not render correctly on initial load

What-If toggle button closes panel on second click
Savings Rate slider present with data-testid='savings-rate-slider'
Market Return slider present with data-testid='market-return-slider'
Retirement Age slider present with data-testid='retirement-age-slider'
Inflation slider present with data-testid='inflation-slider'
Default values displayed: 15%, 7%, 60, 3%

Retirement Nest Egg metric displayed in impact section
Monthly Savings metric displayed in impact section

Save as Scenario button navigates to /scenarios page

critical_code_review_comments: What-If feature implementation is complete and working correctly
Slider interactions trigger real-time recalculation of projected metrics
Impact calculations use client-side financial projection model as expected
Backend Monte Carlo simulation endpoint is called when whatIfParams change
context_for_next_testing_agent: What-If Quick Toggle feature fully tested and working. Panel opens/closes with toggle button. All 4 sliders work: Savings Rate (5-50%, default 15%), Market Return (2-12%, default 7%), Retirement Age (50-70, default 60), Inflation (1-6%, default 3%). When modified, shows Projected Impact with Retirement Nest Egg, Monthly Savings, Success Probability. Reset button resets to defaults. Save as Scenario navigates to /scenarios. Compliance modal appears on first visit - dismiss by checking checkbox and clicking 'I Understand & Accept'.

mocked_apis.note: Dashboard and What-If calculations use MOCKED APIs that return calculated data
